properties.name: EIR15 geozone adjusted
properties.message:
Access may be requested through the zone authority for Specific Category
operations. Allow at least three working days. UAS which has a mass of less than 25
kilograms, without fuel but including any articles or equipment installed in or
attached to the aircraft and including cargo at the commencement of its flight, may
be operated at a height above the surface of not more than 8 metres (25 ft)

properties.name: Coonagh Aerodrome Safety Information Area
properties.message:
Active aerodrome – low level manned flight operations occur from ground level to 1000 ft AGL.
VFR flight training and circuit activity may take place seven days a week. Circuit patterns and active runway directions vary depending on weather and operational conditions.
Drone operators are requested to review current aerodrome information prior to flight and, where operating nearby, provide details of intended activity via the PPR/contact form at: https://www.limerickflyingclub.com/airfield-data/
Information sharing is advisory and intended to support safe coordination between unmanned and manned aviation activities.
